channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Don't wait for EOFY – there's still time to nab exceptional savings on the AirPods Pro 3, AirTags and more Apple gear if you're quick
item.description: We thought the recent sales events in Australia would be the last time we'd see any discounts on Apple tech. How wrong we were, as these savings of up to 40% prove.

item.title: A former Thiel fellow’s startup just launched a drone it says can replace police helicopters
item.description: Brinc launched its newest 911 response drone this week, as the company seeks to expand its prominence in the public safety industry.

item.title: The BB-777 is the ultimate in boombox nostalgia
item.description: Bumpboxx is fully embracing nostalgia with its latest boombox, the BB-777, which is modeled very closely on the legendary Sharp GF-777. A real deal GF-777 will set you back over $2,000 for one in working order. Plus, that vintage unit lacks modern amenities like Bluetooth or a rechargeable battery. Heck, it doesn't even have a […]

item.title: No dropouts, no stress: United’s Starlink Wi-Fi just works — and the rollout to every plane can’t come soon enough
‘Daredevil: Born Again’ Season 2 Is a Slow Burn That’s Worth the Wait
item.description: Charlie Cox and Vincent D'Onofrio star in the New York-based Marvel Studios show, now streaming.

item.title: I watched all 8 episodes of Daredevil: Born Again season 2 on Disney+ — and the Marvel TV show would be even better than it is if it could fully exorcise its demons
item.description: Despite its obvious flaws, the latest entry in Daredevil's MCU TV show on Disney+ is a fiendishly good time.

item.title: Amazon just bought a startup making kid-size humanoid robots
item.description: The acquisition of Fauna Robotics is the second robotics startup Amazon has purchased this month.

item.title: With $3.5B in fresh capital, Kleiner Perkins is going all in on AI
item.description: The fundraise includes $1 billion for investing in early-stage startups, and $2.5 billion for late-stage growth businesses.
